headline: 4 ETFs That Mirror Warren Buffett’s Buy-and-Hold Strategy in 2026
summary: Warren Buffett built his fortune by buying businesses with durable competitive advantages at reasonable prices and holding them for decades. A handful of ETFs are built around the core mechanics of how Buffett actually invests, whether through Morningstar’s moat framework, free cash flow screening, or direct exposure to Berkshire Hathaway’s portfolio itself. headline: How The Investment Story Is Shifting For National Bank Of Greece (ATSE:ETE)
summary: National Bank of Greece is now working off a slightly higher internal fair value estimate, with the model price target moving from about €15.64 to roughly €15.92. That shift sits alongside Street targets that cluster in the €15.70 to €16.10 range, including JPMorgan’s €15.70 and €16.10 points, which gives you a sense of how closely aligned current pricing views have become. headline: Had You Invested $1,000 in Goldman Sachs 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Now
summary: Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) reported Q1 2026 EPS of $17.55 versus a FactSet estimate of $16.47, with revenue of $17.23 billion, up 14%, against a $16.99 billion estimate. Net earnings rose 18% to $5.63 billion, EPS climbed 24%, equity trading revenue rose 27%, and investment banking fees rose 48%. Yet the stock fell approximately 4% ... headline: China’s Victory Giant Seeks Up to $2.2 Billion in Hong Kong Listing
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co. began taking investor orders for a listing in Hong Kong that may raise as much as HK$17.5 billion ($2.2 billion) in what is set to be among the city’s largest first-time share sales this year. The company, which makes printed circuit board products — the intricate electronic backbone of artificial-intelligence servers — is offering 83.3 million shares at as much as HK$209.88 each, according to a listing document released on Monday. headline: JPMorgan Chase Initiative Links Community Lending Push With Valuation Debate
summary: JPMorgan Chase, NYSE:JPM, has launched the American Dream Initiative, a multi year program aimed at expanding economic opportunity. The initiative focuses on lending, branch expansion, and community development to support underserved areas across the US.
